info.title: Pandabase V2 API
info.description: Token-authenticated programmatic API for managing stores, products, orders, and more. Authenticated via Bearer token (sk_ prefix) or HMAC (stk_ token ID).

post.description: Cancel at period end (default) or immediately. Immediate cancellation revokes access and licenses.

immediate.description: If true, cancel immediately and revoke access. If false, cancel at end of current billing period.

post.description: Pause billing. No charges until resumed. Only active subscriptions can be paused.
Resume billing on a paused subscription. Charges resume at end of current period or immediately if the period has ended.

BearerAuth.description: Store API token. Use the `sk_` prefixed secret key as the Bearer token.

HMAC.name: Authorization
HMAC.description: HMAC authentication using `stk_` token ID. Send `HMAC stk_xxx:signature` where signature is HMAC-SHA256 of the request body.

id.description: Existing variant ID to update. Omit to create a new variant.

value.description: Discount value. For FIXED: amount in cents. For PERCENTAGE: percentage (1-100).

productIds.description: Product IDs this coupon is scoped to. Empty array means the coupon applies to all products.
Product IDs to scope this coupon to. Omit to apply to all products.
Product IDs to scope this coupon to. Pass null or empty array to remove scoping. Omit to leave unchanged.

PaymentDetail.description: Full payment details with geo, timeline, and dispute info

nextChargeAt.description: Next automatic charge date. Null when cancelled or paused.

trialEnd.description: Trial end date. Null if no trial.

endsAt.description: When access ends for cancelled-at-period-end subscriptions.

retryCount.description: Number of failed payment retry attempts.

WebhookPayload.description: V2 webhook payload delivered to your endpoint
